opportunity.title: Schedule tasks on the web
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The biggest gotcha with web-scheduled tasks isn't the scheduling itself, but the idempotency of the underlying operations. You'll need robust retry logic and a system to prevent duplicate executions, especially when dealing with flaky network connections or provider timeouts—otherwise, you’re just building an expensive error amplifier.
actions.reasoning: My work routing LLM calls across providers and orchestrating tools for agents gives me a unique perspective on the challenges of scheduling tasks in a web context, particularly around reliability and cost.
